description: UI-side worker demo state and patch-apply function

v.code: const host = ctx.hostApi; if (!host) throw new Error('host_api_missing'); const mtRead = (modelId, p, r, c, k, fallback = null) => { const result = host.readCrossModel(modelId, p, r, c, k); return result && result.ok && result.data && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(result.data, 'v') ? patch.op_id : 'ui_side_owner_req_1'), mt('target_model_id', 'int', 1), mt('origin_action', 'str', 'ui_apply_snapshot_delta'), mt('write_labels', 'json', writeLabels), mt('remove_labels', 'json', removeLabels)]); } mtDrop(-10, 0, 0, 0, 'ui_mgmt_inbox');
